name: Smoked Chicken Club Sandwich
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
6 thick slices of Swiss peasant bread
2 ripe tomatoes, cored and thinly sliced
8 ounces very thinly sliced smoked skinned chicken breast
2 kirby cucumbers, seeded and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until it becomes crisp.
2. In a blender or food processor, puree the olives, mustard, anchovy paste, olive oil, vinegar, and garlic. Season with salt and pepper to taste and adjust the amount of vinegar for desired tanginess.
3. Toast the bread lightly. Remove the cooked bacon from paper towels to drain excess fat.
4. To assemble:
a. Spread the olive mixture on one side of each slice of bread.
b. Place some bacon on the bottom slice, then add tomato and onion slices, chicken breast, and cucumber.
c. Season each layer lightly with salt and pepper as you go.
5. Top with the third slice of bread (olive mixture side down). Repeat steps 4a-4c to assemble the second sandwich.
Yield: 2 servings
